title: orychophragmus diffusus
intro: Orychophragmus diffusus, also known as the Chinese celery cabbage or spreading field cabbage, is a type of flowering plant native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orychophragmus diffusus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
